title: hypochaeris meyeniana var. ciliata
intro: Hypochaeris meyeniana var. ciliata, also known as the Peruvian dandelion, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to South America. The plant has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include being used to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, and to support liver function. Hypochaeris meyeniana var. ciliata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a diuretic to promote urine production.
